name: ouroboros-skills
description: Core skills for the Ouroboros agent harness. Each skill is a markdown file your agent can consume directly.

skills.name: Understand the Psyche System
skills.description: Teaches an agent about the five psyche files (SOUL, IDENTITY, LORE, FRIENDS, TACIT) and how to internalize them.

skills.name: Use the Dream Cycle
skills.description: Teaches an agent about overnight self-improvement: memory synthesis, task grooming, and self-reflection.

skills.name: Bootstrap a New Agent
skills.description: Step-by-step instructions for creating an agent bundle from scratch: directory structure, agent.json, psyche files, and first run.

skills.name: Understand the Body Architecture
skills.description: Explains the organ-based module structure: heart, mind, senses, repertoire, wardrobe, daemon. How to navigate and modify the codebase.

skills.name: Use the Sliding Context Window
skills.description: How the context consumption system works: token budgeting, memory extraction before trimming, and how to write code that plays well with it.

skills.name: Build Custom Tools
skills.description: How to create new tools for the repertoire: the tool schema, registration, channel-aware routing, and confirmation gates.
